package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
	"net/http"
)

// scenario for parsemultipartform_large_default_memory: Gin handlers that call ParseMultipartForm(...) with large in-memory thresholds on request paths.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: gin; severity: contextual.
type Rule331NegativeRecord struct {
	Name string
}

type Rule331NegativeService interface {
	Handle(context.Context, Rule331NegativeRecord) (Rule331NegativeRecord, error)
}

func scenario331Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule331NegativeService, input Rule331NegativeRecord) (Rule331NegativeRecord, int) {
	output, err := service.Handle(ctx, input)
	if err != nil {
		return Rule331NegativeRecord{}, http.StatusBadRequest
	}
	return output, http.StatusOK
}
